name: Pina Colada Sheet Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Baked yellow cake in a 9-by-, 13-inch pan, from scratch
1 can Crushed pineapple, juice undrained (20 oz)
1 pint Whipping cream; sweetened to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. While the cake is still warm, punch holes all over it.
2. Mix the condensed milk and cream of coconut, and rum if using, in a bowl.
3. Slowly spoon the mixture over the cake. It takes some time to soak in, so be patient.
4. Drizzle the pineapple and its juice over the cake.
5. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
6. Before serving, cover with whipped cream or topping and sprinkle with coconut.
